title: Snapshot Testing Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Jest snapshot testing.

questions.question: Regarding the testing of frontend components, what is the primary role of 'Snapshot Testing'?
options: To verify that a React component correctly displays its user interface by comparing it against a previously saved snapshot

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a snapshot-testing-based workflow for a component?
options: Creating a snapshot of a component's rendering and then using 'toMatchSnapshot' to compare it against a original version
Recording a commit directly to the SQL server
Its only possible for SQL repositories
